channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: RPG Difficulty
item.description: Increases creatures stats as you move further away from spawn or going deeper in the caves

item.title: Vintage Rift - Client
item.description: Client only code for the Vintage Rift server

item.title: Murlok Vintage Server Patch
item.description: Collection of tweaks for the Murlok server and playthrough.

item.title: Rust Girls
item.description: Monster girls, in MY Vintage Story? Sure, why not.

item.title: Level UP
item.description: Add new levels systems to your character

item.title: Modular Backpacks
item.description: Makes vanilla backpacks modular, allowing you to attach addons to extend storage slots.

item.title: Equus: Tack and Equipment
item.description: Adds various saddles, bridles, and saddleblankets for Equus and Monoceros

item.title: Fast Packed Dirt Paths
item.description: Increases player speed when walking on packed dirt

item.title: server tweaks
item.description: for vintagereborn

item.title: Extra clayforming tool modes
item.description: Adds a 1x3 and 3x1 tool mode while clayforming

item.title: Better Pyrolysis
item.description: Adds several new features regarding pyrolyzing different fuels.

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Peaceful Mode!
item.description: A very useful tool for the casual seraph. Toggleable.

item.title: RKN Generic Crafting
item.description: Generic gridless crafting system that completely replaces all UI grid recipes

item.title: Only Flower Seeds
item.description: Cultivate vanilla flowers by extracting seeds from them.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Tyrant King — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals tyrannosaurids to Vintage Story. Unofficial compatibility port for 1.22.3

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Shovel Mouth — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of hadrosauroids dinosaurs to Vintage Story. Unofficial compatibility port for Vinta

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Sharp Tooth — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals carcharodontosaurids to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Scythe Claws — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of therizinosaurids dinosaurs to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Sailed Spine — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals spinosaurids to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Plated Back — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of stegosaurian dinosaurs to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Ocean Tyrant — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals Mosasaurids to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Long Neck — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of Macronarians dinosaurs to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Horrible Hands — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of ornithomimosauria dinosaurs to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Horned Crown — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of ceratopsian dinosaurs to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Fused Body — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of ankylosaurian dinosaurs to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Domed Head — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of pachycephalosaurians dinosaurs to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Carnivorous Bull — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals abelisaurids to Vintage Story.

item.title: Modular Backpacks Lights Out
item.description: Simple change to Modular Backpacks to remove lantern attachment.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Birds of Prey — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals dromaeosaurids to Vintage Story.
